title: Caveopolis Mod
description: Mod mainly used for caveopolis modpack
body:
Join the discord to report bugs issues suggestions

https://discord.gg/UpJknJ8

Mainly for the caveopolis modpack but can be used standalone 

Caveopolis is a mod that adds many colored stone

Some other stuff added:

Mossy stone

Moss balls

bright stone and bright shards (can be used to make stone torches)

ore fragments different stone pebbles

stone crafting table

mixed stone ingots

Can be used in any modpack
